heading: Omitted
label: 677 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which set out the purpose of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 27, 1954, ch. 1009, § 168 Stat. 868
Repeal of Inconsistent Laws, , which provided for repeal of inconsistent laws, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Aug. 27, 1954, ch. 1009, § 2968 Stat. 878
Separability, , which set forth separability provision, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Aug. 27, 1954, ch. 1009, § 3068 Stat. 878
